wikimediacustomizations-desc: The WikimediaCustomization extension hosts Wikimedia-specific hooks, messages and other site customizations.
wikimediacustomizations-bademaildomain-e: Email addresses using $1 are not supported. Please choose another email provider.
wikimediacustomizations-forcereauth-erro: As a security measure, you have to reauthenticate before using this functionality. You can use this URL to reauthenticate: $1
